conditions.command: execute if entity @e[tag=sentinel,sort=nearest,distance=0..] if score @s grave.ID = @e[tag=sentinel,limit=1,sort=nearest] grave.ID
execute if entity @e[tag=sentinel,sort=nearest,distance=0..] if score @s grave.ID = @e[tag=sentinel,limit=1,sort=nearest] grave.ID

last_tick_commands: execute if entity @e[tag=sentinel] if score @s grave.ID = @e[tag=sentinel,limit=1,sort=nearest] grave.ID run function satsu_iron_man_addon:sentinels/kill_one_sentinel

enabling.command: execute if entity @e[limit=1,type=wolf,nbt={Sitting:1b}] if entity @e[tag=sentinel,sort=nearest,distance=0.1..0.5] if score @s grave.ID = @e[tag=sentinel,limit=1,sort=nearest] grave.ID
